expected_text: Today I reviewed my job application tracker and checked the status of several AI Engineer applications. I applied for the Generative AI Engineer internship at Analytics Vidhya. I tailored my resume, submitted the application, connected with employees, and engaged with their posts. However, the role is based in Haryana, so I need to think carefully before asking for referrals.I also applied for an AI Engineer opportunity at Aiden AI. The opening was posted on LinkedIn, and I sent my resume through email. I have already started asking for referrals. Another medium-priority opportunity is Coastal Seven Consulting, where I asked one connection for a referral and am waiting for other invitations to be accepted. For JCurveIQ and YourLio AI, my next step is to engage with posts, send connection requests, wait for a few days, and then ask for referrals. I also applied to Rockwell Automation, where I received a referral before applying. For now, my focus is to follow up on medium-priority applications and avoid spending too much time on roles requiring several years of experience.

I applied to SVS International for a Computer Vision Engineer internship. I could not find a LinkedIn page for the company, so my next step is to check whether a cold email address is available.

However, after engaging with the company for a while, I may ask whether they have any junior engineer or internship opportunities.
